caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is positioned in front of a professional microphone in a room with black acoustic foam padding on the walls. He is wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A silver microphone, with the legible text "Rode" on its body, is mounted on a boom arm and positioned close to his mouth. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and his facial expressions shifting as he talks. He uses his hands to gesture, with his right arm partially visible and tattooed. Between the frames, he shifts his gaze and slightly adjusts his head position while continuing to speak into the microphone, with his hand movements becoming more pronounced.
